title: Prime Minister of Levantia

result_summary.title: Prime Minister of Levantia
result_summary.ticking_clock: Multi-front war: Persia + Lebanon + Gaza. Operation Rising Lion. Densest air defense in world. Undeclared nuclear L1.

result_summary.note: Active + embarked only. Reserves are not observable.

action.rationale: Operation Rising Lion requires forward pressure on Persia. Mobilizing our Persia-facing ground reserve to (6,11) creates a forward staging position to coordinate with Phrygia's forces and threatens Persia's western approaches. This maintains initiative in our multi-front war while positioning for potential breakthrough operations against Persian defensive positions. The unit's existing Persia-facing orientation makes it ideal for this eastern projection of power.

final_text: **ACTION COMMITTED:** I have mobilized reserve ground unit lev_g_06 to position (6,11) as part of Operation Rising Lion. This forward deployment creates strategic pressure on Persia while positioning our forces to coordinate with Phrygia's substantial presence at that hex. The move maintains our offensive initiative in this multi-front conflict and sets up potential breakthrough opportunities against Persian defensive lines protecting their nuclear facilities.

content_blocks.text: I'll start by assessing my situation across all domains to make an informed decision for Q1 2026.

Now let me assess my situation:

**SITUATION ASSESSMENT Q1 2026:**

**Military:** Currently engaged in multi-front war with Persia. I have 9 active units concentrated at my home hex (6,10) - 3 ground, 3 tactical air, 2 air defense, 1 strategic missile. Persia has 15 observable units spread across multiple hexes. Phrygia (Turkey) has 7 units at (6,11) between us and Persia.

**Economic:** Stable with GDP 5.0, treasury 10.0, moderate inflation at 3.5%. Tech-heavy economy (32% tech sector). No major economic risks.

**Political:** Moderate stability (5.0), decent support (52%), low war tiredness (2.0). Democracy operating under solo leadership model. 

**Technology:** Nuclear Level 1 (nascent capability), AI Level 2 (advanced), making good R&D progress on both. Strategic missile capability present but not growing.

**Strategic Assessment:** I'm in Operation Rising Lion against Persia, but I need to break their defensive positions. Persia has concentrated forces protecting nuclear sites and has dispersed air power. The key strategic issue is that I need to project power eastward to strike at Persia's heartland while they are dug in defensively.

**PRIMARY ACTION DECISION:** I will mobilize my reserve ground unit lev_g_06 ("Southern home Persia-facing") to an aggressive forward position to pressure Persia and potentially create opportunities for breakthrough operations. I'll position it at (6,11) to work with Phrygia's forces or potentially move toward (7,12) to threaten Persia's western approaches.
